svg.title: Blocklist Remediation Flow
svg.desc: Blocklist remediation workflow for email deliverability. When a deliverability drop is detected, check major blocklists. If not listed, investigate other causes. If listed, identify which blocklist and severity, investigate the root cause, fix it before requesting removal, request delisting, verify removal, and monitor for relisting. If still listed after removal request, return to investigation. If relisted after clearing, the root cause was not fully resolved. The critical rule: never request removal until the root cause is fixed.

cc:Work.dc:title: Blocklist Remediation Flow Diagram
cc:Work.dc:creator: InboxAlly
cc:Work.dc:subject: blocklist remediation, Spamhaus SBL, Spamhaus DBL, Spamcop, Barracuda, blocklist removal, delisting, spam traps, complaint rate, email deliverability, sender reputation, MXToolbox
cc:Work.dc:description: Operational workflow for detecting, diagnosing, and resolving blocklist listings with severity ratings, root cause investigation, and verification steps.

g.text: Inbox rate drops · SMTP blocks · Bounce spikes

g.aria-label: Not listed: check auth, content, engagement

g.text: IP-based · used by all major providers
Do not request removal until the issue is resolved
